name: /pr-source-add dry-run prints the planned addition without modifying the registry file
command:
mkdir -p stub/myorg/myrepo .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"name":"myrepo","pushed_at":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z"}
' > stub/myorg/myrepo/repo-metadata.json && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: []
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-add.sh" myorg/myrepo --gh-clone-stub stub --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --tier 2 --source-class financial-industry --dry-run --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'myorg' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && grep -q 'planned: add myorg/myrepo' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
